evidence: TASK-049 verified end-to-end; closes FGAP-030 + FGAP-078. The drift report is a reflected op: context-check-status (zero params, surface use, the context-status template) returns { json: checkStatus(cwd) } — per installed schema the drift state, baseline_version, catalog_version, and the additive reporting fields behind (true iff state is catalog-ahead or both-diverged) and version_delta ({from, to, basis: version-bump | content-only}; basis is version-bump iff both versions present and differ — catalog-ahead is a hash comparison, so behind at equal versions reports the content-only basis). Not-behind assets carry neither field (wire-absent, probe-verified after a JSON round-trip). The classification arm is byte-identical (probe diffed the function across the commit: empty diff through the if/else arm; the existing classification tests untouched, additions only). renderCheckStatus keeps the state grouping + Total and annotates behind names inline — name (1.0.0 -> 1.0.1) for a version bump, name (1.0.1, content changed) for content-only, graceful when a version is undefined; the in-pi /context check-status handler renders the same report. The op is slotted in Read & query with an example; --json is the single-parse envelope; bare text is the JSON.stringify precedent; zero params confirmed behaviorally (an unknown flag exits 2). Adversarial fixtures verified: version-bump behind, content-only behind (the stale-marker idiom), both-diverged behind, locally-modified NOT behind (fields absent), in-sync/no-baseline/missing-catalog/missing-installed unannotated, the undefined-catalog-version edge (no crash, content-only basis, sane render). Runtime demo: a 1.0.0-vs-1.0.1 substrate answers the operator question on the op, the library, and the render. Gates: build + check + full test fail 0; parity-check exit 0; examples + groupForOp drift guards green; SKILL regen zero-drift, both SKILLs carry the op; READMEs + skill-narrative audited to the version-gap wording; three CHANGELOGs; no substrate ids in shipped md. Fresh adversarial probe (Fable) PASS, zero defects; the verbatim-delta check against the operator story found no qualifier.
